key.name: extension-enabled
key.description: When false the extension takes no action on keyboard position changes and any active overlays are cleared.

key.name: bottom-screen-connector
key.summary: Connector name of the bottom screen
key.description: The output connector (e.g. eDP-1, eDP-2) that corresponds to the bottom touchscreen — the one with the magnetic keyboard slots.

key.name: top-screen-connector
key.summary: Connector name of the top screen
key.description: The output connector (e.g. eDP-1, eDP-2) that corresponds to the top built-in screen. The dock is moved here when the keyboard is placed.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: When true, position changes and overlay actions are written to the GNOME Shell journal: journalctl -f /usr/bin/gnome-shell

key.name: show-osk-when-detached
key.summary: Show on-screen keyboard when keyboard is detached
key.description: Automatically enable the accessibility on-screen keyboard when the magnetic keyboard is not placed on the screen.

key.name: keyboard-height-ratio
key.summary: Keyboard height as a fraction of screen height
key.description: The physical keyboard covers this fraction of the bottom screen height. 0.56 = 56%. Increase if the keyboard covers more than half the screen.

key.name: original-dock-monitor
key.description: Used internally to restore the dock after a crash or unexpected logout.

key.name: original-dock-connector
key.description: Used internally to restore the dock after a crash or unexpected logout.
